insight: The error `org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.exceptions.YamlEngineException: Non scalar key is detected but it is not configured to be allowed` means boss .yml files contain YAML complex keys (the `? ==:` syntax used by older Boss versions for Player drops). This causes bosses to silently fail to load after updating. The fix is updating to Boss 5.8.4+ which includes automatic migration of the old format. Users will report "bosses disappeared" but the .yml files are still on disk — they just fail to parse.
